full_text:
Dong Zhao (Gongren) 董昭 (公仁)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Dong Zhao (董昭), styledGongren (公仁), was born in Dingtao county, Jiyin commandery. Advised Cao Cao to move the capital to Xuchang. Dong Zhao was affiliated with the Han Dynasty, Yuan Shao, Zhang Yang, and the Wei Kingdom. Dong Zhao lived during the Later Han Dynasty and Three Kingdoms periods of Chinese history.
